label: PLA Activity (Apr 22, 2026) — Post-Surge Pullback; PLAN Passes Okinawa
value: 6 sorties; 5 PLAN vessels; 4 cross median line
contestNote: 6 PLA aircraft sorties Apr 22 — sharp de-escalation from 24-sortie spike Apr 21 (highest non-exercise count since Justice Mission-2025); 4 of 6 crossed into SW and eastern ADIZ; PLAN Formation 133 passed Okinawa (Yonaguni-Iriomote Waterway) completing tit-for-tat response arc to JMSDF Ikazuchi strait transit Apr 17; 22 days to Trump-Xi summit (May 14-15)
deltaNote: Liaoning carrier transit Apr 20 (5 sorties, 12 vessels) → 24-sortie spike Apr 21 (11 crossing median line) → 6 sorties Apr 22 de-escalation; PLAN Okinawa return passage Apr 22 completes full military response arc; established pattern: Apr 11 17 sorties → Apr 12 2 sorties; Mar 29 19 sorties → Mar 30 1 sortie
